rationale: ENH-2495's shared lifecycle foundation is absent, while the required migration, recorder, reader, and tests closely mirror existing session-store patterns. A coordinated implementation avoids an unscheduled wait and split ownership while keeping the producer wiring best-effort and directly testable.
alternatives_rejected: Option B — Wait: no formal dependency or schedule exists and the observability gap would persist; Option C — Land ENH-2509 first: assigns most shared ENH-2495 infrastructure to ENH-2509 and leaves a split follow-up review.
